title: Xtensions
description: Xtensions is a Mod that adds much extensions to others like Axes. Also Mod is made with Mcreator to keep in Mind.
body:
This Mod extens the way of Minecraft with new Powers, Ores and more.
# Big notice:
_This Mod will not be continuing after I got the Mod data back_(it got corrupted)
# What it´s about?
Well, this a extension mod that makes Minecraft more Updaty.
Like more Recipes for Armor, Tools and more. Experience Minecraft in a Differant Way with this Mod.


# Featured Items
- Zinc Tools
- Zinc Ore/Ingot
- Copper Armor
- Copper Tools
- Emerald Armor
- Emerald Tools
- Sculk Tools
- Deep Dark Key
- Book of Powers
  
- Explainations Book
- A Plastic Axe and its extension the Better Plastic Axe
- A Clown Glove

# Featured Blocks

![Sculk Portal Open Helper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7633d9a303c4052832209c8245a9a509aa9fe058.png)
- Open Portal Helper
- Portal Open Helper Base

## Small Advancements
![Sculk Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f0a510f6feae81673be49e22492317de7b61165.png)
![Deep Dark World](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f32bb31f5a44c40e9cd334cfe9055e06af7dbc3.png)

## Experimental Items
- Init Motor
